## Meeting Purpose

[Re-engage on an SEO partnership and align on a start date.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**RunLlama's Urgency:** The current investor-recommended SEO agency is "exceptionally bad," forcing a termination next week. A January start with GrowthX is unworkable, as the board demands immediate marketing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Capacity:** GrowthX is at capacity, capping new clients at two per week to maintain quality. A January start is the earliest possible slot, as the team is focused on launching its own LLM analytics product.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Murtaza will email Marcel (GrowthX leadership) directly, CC'ing Tyler, to make a "Hail Mary" appeal for an earlier start.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Topics

### RunLlama's Urgent Need

  - [**Problem:** The current SEO agency, chosen under investor pressure, is "exceptionally bad" and will be terminated next week.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [**Urgency:** A January start is unworkable. The board demands immediate marketing velocity, and a \~2-month delay is not an option for Murtaza.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**Context:** RunLlama is a developer-first company with massive organic reach (50–100M weekly open-source downloads, 0 paid ads). The board expects this momentum to translate into marketing results.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### GrowthX's Capacity Constraints

  - [**Limitation:** GrowthX is at capacity, capping new clients at two per week to maintain quality and focus.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Priority:** The team is focused on launching its own LLM analytics product, replacing its current use of Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Trade-off:** Taking on RunLlama now would require declining other high-profile clients (e.g., Brex, Navon, Zapier).](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### Proposed Solution: Direct Appeal

  - [**Proposal:** Murtaza will email Marcel (GrowthX leadership) directly to appeal for an earlier start.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach is the best chance for an exception, as Tyler has already surfaced the request to other leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Pre-Work:** GrowthX can conduct pre-sprint work (e.g., SEO audit) before a formal kickoff to accelerate value delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Murtaza:** Email Marcel (GrowthX leadership), CC'ing Tyler, to make a direct appeal for an earlier start date, explaining the business urgency.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Follow up with Marcel after receiving Murtaza's email to support the request.](https://fathom.video/share/_X4sxxzziAWUJ_Gj_EpK96_nqwdy6Pyv?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
